Hey you! I wasn't able to thank you for the fun hotel and miami experience. Thank you, always to help you out.

I was wondering, since I don't get paid until next week if I could purchase my mom a ticket to come visit and have bella take it from my check??? It is about $400. This would be a huge help if I could!!

Again, I had fun!!
